'''shajacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oilcake|oilcake]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-j-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oilcake|oilcake]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shajacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæjæchæth|shæjæchæth]] || [[word:shæjæchæj|shæjæchæj]] || [[word:shæjæchæsh|shæjæchæsh]] || [[word:shæjæchæ|shæjæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shajajachath|shajajachath]] || [[word:shajajachaj|shajajachaj]] || [[word:shajajachash|shajajachash]] || [[word:shajajacha|shajajacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shajachath|shajachath]] || [[word:shajachaj|shajachaj]] || [[word:shajachash|shajachash]] || [[word:shajacha|shajacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shajafchath|shajafchath]] || [[word:shajafchaj|shajafchaj]] || [[word:shajafchash|shajafchash]] || [[word:shajafchaf|shajafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shajachatha|shajachatha]] || [[word:shajachaja|shajachaja]] || [[word:shajachasha|shajachasha]] || [[word:shajachaka|shajachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shajachath|shajachath]] || [[word:shajachaj|shajachaj]] || [[word:shajachash|shajachash]] || [[word:shajacha|shajacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shajachathal|shajachathal]] || [[word:shajachajal|shajachajal]] || [[word:shajachashal|shajachashal]] || [[word:shajachakal|shajachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shajachathatha|shajachathatha]] || [[word:shajachajaja|shajachajaja]] || [[word:shajachashasha|shajachashasha]] || [[word:shajachaka|shajachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shajachathan|shajachathan]] || [[word:shajachajan|shajachajan]] || [[word:shajachashan|shajachashan]] || [[word:shajachakan|shajachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shajachathaoro|shajachathaoro]] || [[word:shajachajaoro|shajachajaoro]] || [[word:shajachashaoro|shajachashaoro]] || [[word:shajachakaoro|shajachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
